title: agent_described carries the agent's self-description under avp.descriptor
description: Before the run proper begins, the agent advertises what it is via agent_described.data.avp.descriptor: an AgentDescriptor carrying at least agent_name and spec_version. This lets a supervisor audit what the agent showed up with. agent_name varies by implementation (so it is not asserted here); spec_version is the wire contract and MUST be 0.1. Structural and model-agnostic.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
